title: stenogyne microphylla
intro: Stenogyne microphylla, also known as Hawaiian mountain mint, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stenogyne microphylla include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
